001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.session;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.mode.BoxItemClickMode;
004import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.mode.ClickModeRegistry;
005import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
007
008import java.util.HashMap;
009import java.util.Map;
010import java.util.Objects;
011import java.util.UUID;
012
013public class PlayerSession {
014
015    private static final Map<UUID, PlayerSession> SESSION_MAP = new HashMap<>();
016
017    public static @NotNull PlayerSession get(@NotNull Player player) {
018        return SESSION_MAP.computeIfAbsent(player.getUniqueId(), uuid -> new PlayerSession());
019    }
020
021    private BoxItemClickMode currentClickMode = ClickModeRegistry.getModes().get(0);
022
023    private final Map<String, CustomNumberHolder> customNumberMap = new HashMap<>();
024
025    private PlayerSession() {
026    }
027
028    public @NotNull BoxItemClickMode getBoxItemClickMode() {
029        return currentClickMode;
030    }
031
032    public void setBoxItemClickMode(@NotNull BoxItemClickMode boxItemClickMode) {
033        this.currentClickMode = Objects.requireNonNull(boxItemClickMode);
034    }
035
036    public @NotNull CustomNumberHolder getCustomNumberHolder(@NotNull String numberName) {
037        return customNumberMap.computeIfAbsent(numberName, k -> new CustomNumberHolder());
038    }
039
040    public void resetCustomNumbers() {
041        customNumberMap.values().forEach(num -> num.setAmount(1));
042    }
043}
